prompt: Create a hyperreal cinematic close-up portrait of a rain-soaked cyberpunk female assassin holding a translucent neon glass dagger with intense, deliberate intent. The composition is very tight and vertical, focused on the left side of the character’s wet face, ear, neck, shoulder, and hand gripping the weapon; most of the face is obscured by a large centered square censor-like overlay, about two thirds of the image width, filled with a dark navy-to-muted-blue gradient. Show slick black wet hair clinging to skin, a visible ear with two small metallic piercings, glossy black leather or tactical collar around the neck, bare wet shoulder, subtle tattoos on the upper chest, and water droplets across skin and clothing. The dagger is held upright along the right side of the frame, close to the face, made of clear glass or crystal with glowing cyan and magenta circuitry-like reflections inside it. Use electric blue and hot magenta neon rim lighting, with strong reflections on wet skin, hair, leather, and the blade. Add mist, rain droplets, tiny floating particles, and blue haze drifting through the frame to create a moody futuristic noir tone. The visible eye area is hidden by the square overlay, but the body language should imply cold determination. Shallow depth of field, dramatic high contrast, ultra-detailed skin texture, glossy specular highlights, bokeh neon background, hyperreal photography style, no text, no watermark.
